cross_scene_arcs.title: From Bravado to Vulnerability: Confronting Mortality
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eddie's initial confidence as a celebrated detective is gradually undermined by physical strain, existential doubt, and violent confrontation, leading to a transformation from self-assured performer to a man confronting his own fragility and the cost of his public persona.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Eddie recounts a near-death experience with bravado but reveals underlying fatigue and fear of being forgotten.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Eddie is physically attacked and left fighting for his life, his image shattered and his survival uncertain.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Eddie can reconcile his need for fame with the reality of his vulnerability remains unresolved, culminating in his potential death as a public spectacle.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Evolution of Commitment: Love Amid Chaos
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eddie's journey toward emotional maturity centers on his desire to propose to Nicolette, a goal repeatedly interrupted by the encroachment of his violent professional world, symbolizing the tension between personal intimacy and public duty.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Eddie decides to propose, practicing in the mirror and showing nervous anticipation about emotional exposure.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: His proposal is violently interrupted by attackers, turning a moment of love into a life-threatening assault broadcast on camera.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The future of Eddie's relationship with Nicolette is left in jeopardy, with his survival and ability to sustain intimacy uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Rivalry to Reluctant Partnership: Eddie and Jordy's Shifting Dynamic
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eddie's relationship with Jordy evolves from competitive tension to a fragile alliance, as both men navigate jurisdictional boundaries and personal distrust while converging on the same investigation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Eddie transfers case credit to Jordy, attempting to assert influence while maintaining control over the narrative.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jordy begins cooperating despite emotional detachment, signaling a shift toward mutual, if uneasy, respect.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The balance of power between Eddie and Jordy remains unstable, with unresolved tension over recognition, authority, and professional legitimacy.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Truth vs. Control: The Battle Over the Investigation's Narrative
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eddie's pursuit of the truth increasingly clashes with institutional efforts to control the investigation, particularly with Deputy Chief Duffy, creating a central conflict between transparency and authority.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Eddie discovers the timer, confirming the fire was arson and positioning himself as a truth-seeker.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Eddie publicly reveals evidence, defying fire department leadership and taking responsibility to protect Jordy, solidifying his role as a disruptive force.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The institutional resistance led by Duffy persists, leaving unresolved whether independent truth-seeking can prevail over bureaucratic control.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Descent into the Underworld: From Reporter to Protector
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Eddie transforms from a detached observer into an active participant in a dangerous conspiracy, shifting from investigative journalist to protector of Daphne and target of violent criminals, blurring the line between reporting and involvement.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Eddie uncovers the necklace linking Oleg and Emil to Daphne, initiating a covert pursuit.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Eddie is attacked in his home by the same men, his name discovered in a victim's address book, marking him as a direct target.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The full scope of the conspiracy, including why Eddie is targeted and the role of the videocamera, remains unknown, leaving his survival and mission incomplete.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Descent into Violence and Loss of Control
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Emil's initial act of violence against Milos and Tamina spirals into a pattern of escalating brutality, triggered by external stimuli and internal instability, culminating in public attacks and ideological self-justification.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Emil kills Milos and Tamina in a rage, failing to recover stolen money but asserting dominance through violence.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Emil embraces his identity as a violent ideologue, declaring fire as his 'friend' and accepting martyrdom, signaling full psychological transformation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Emil's violence stems from trauma, choice, or media influence remains ambiguous, and his capacity for further destruction persists even in capture.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Fracturing Partnership: Control vs. Collaboration
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Emil's authoritarian control over Oleg deteriorates as Oleg increasingly asserts autonomy, leading to a breakdown in their alliance rooted in conflicting visions of authorship, credit, and identity.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Emil establishes strict control over Oleg during their illegal entry, positioning himself as the sole authority.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Oleg escapes with the incriminating film, directly challenging Emil's narrative dominance and triggering a violent confrontation that ends in Emil's arrest.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Oleg remains at large with the footage, threatening to expose or exploit the truth, leaving the power struggle between the two unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Survival to Self-Mythologizing: The Pursuit of Criminal Fame
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Emil evolves from a fugitive seeking survival to an aspirant of notoriety, actively pursuing media-driven infamy as a path to power, legitimacy, and financial gain.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Emil first notices the financial rewards of criminal fame at a newsstand, becoming intrigued by the glamorization of killers.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Emil publicly declares himself a 'success story' in America, embracing his criminal identity as a form of achievement and self-worth.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The tension between Emil's genuine trauma and his calculated performance for fame remains unresolved, blurring the line between authenticity and manipulation.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Internal War: Guilt, Identity, and the Search for Self-Worth
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Emil's external violence is mirrored by an internal struggle with guilt, self-esteem, and identity, as he oscillates between introspection, denial, and the construction of a false self through media and legal manipulation.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Emil becomes fixated on the term 'self-esteem' and consults a dictionary, signaling the beginning of self-reflection amid growing alienation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Emil negotiates his public image in a mental health unit, using trauma as a legal tool while smoking as a symbol of his constructed persona, revealing deep fragmentation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Emil's true psychological state—whether he is mentally ill, traumatized, or strategically performing—remains indeterminate, leaving his moral and legal culpability in question.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Legal and Ideological Transformation: From Fugitive to Defendant
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Emil's status shifts from fugitive to captured defendant, as legal systems attempt to categorize him—mentally unfit, dangerous, or manipulative—while he resists through performance, ideology, and fleeting acts of rebellion.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Emil becomes a wanted killer after murdering a detective, transitioning from escapee to armed threat.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Emil is processed through the justice system, declared potentially unfit, yet still capable of manipulation and resistance, culminating in a final act of defiance during transfer.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The legitimacy of Emil's insanity defense and his ultimate fate—redemption, punishment, or mythologization—remain open, reflecting broader societal ambiguities about crime and justice.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Protégé to Investigator: Distrust of Eddie
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jordy's relationship with Eddie evolves from one of deference and mentorship to suspicion and strategic opposition. Initially seeking inclusion and approval, Jordy gradually uncovers Eddie's manipulative behavior and possible foreknowledge of key events, culminating in a shift from loyalty to investigative scrutiny.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jordy views Eddie as a mentor and seeks his validation to join the investigation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jordy begins to see Eddie as complicit or withholding critical information, altering his approach from collaboration to cautious confrontation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The full extent of Eddie's knowledge and motives remains ambiguous, leaving Jordy's trust in him permanently fractured but not fully resolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Descent into Vengeance: From Justice to Retribution
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Following Eddie's death and personal legal attacks, Jordy's internal conflict intensifies, transforming his pursuit of justice into a personal crusade for revenge. This arc traces his moral erosion, culminating in near-execution of Emil and a public breakdown.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jordy is emotionally devastated by Eddie's death and personally targeted by legal action, beginning his psychological unraveling.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jordy becomes consumed by rage, repeatedly attempting to enact vigilante justice, but is repeatedly interrupted before achieving closure.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Jordy has not achieved emotional or moral resolution; his need for vengeance remains unfulfilled and risks self-destruction.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Protector of Daphne: Duty Transformed into Personal Mission
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jordy's role shifts from detached law enforcement officer to deeply committed protector of Daphne, driven by empathy and moral responsibility. This arc follows his growing emotional investment, boundary-setting, and ultimate decision to defy the system for her sake.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jordy begins to see Daphne not just as a case, but as someone in need of personal protection and trust.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jordy fully commits to fighting for Daphne's safety and legal status, even at the cost of his career and institutional standing.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Daphne's future remains precarious, and Jordy's ability to protect her outside official channels is uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Institutional Fall: From Officer to Outcast
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jordy's professional status deteriorates from respected investigator to suspended, publicly vilified outcast. This arc charts his expulsion from the system, the loss of his badge and credibility, and his struggle to respond to media distortion.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jordy is a functioning officer, though under scrutiny for unorthodox actions.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jordy is stripped of authority, publicly maligned, and isolated, forced to operate outside the law.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Jordy can reclaim his reputation or must redefine justice on his own terms remains unknown.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Hunt for Oleg: Escalation and Failure
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Jordy's mission to stop Oleg escalates from surveillance to direct confrontation, marked by repeated attempts to capture him and seize the incriminating tape. Despite tactical successes, Oleg consistently evades capture, pushing Jordy to increasingly desperate measures.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Jordy becomes aware of Oleg's threat and begins tracking him as a key antagonist.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jordy engages in a public gunfight and forces Oleg into flight, but fails to apprehend him or secure the tape.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Oleg remains at large and in possession of the tape, continuing to manipulate the narrative and evade justice.
